mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, category_name AS categoryName FROM product_category ORDER BY category_id ASC
mapper.sql: SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username) AS merchantName, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.name AS name, p.description AS description, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.order_count AS orderCount, COALESCE(p.monthly_sales, p.order_count, 0) AS monthlySales, p.stock AS stock, p.rating AS rating, p.tag AS tag, COALESCE(mi.delivery_fee, 3.00) AS deliveryFee, COALESCE(mi.min_order_amount, 0.00) AS minOrderAmount, COALESCE(mi.delivery_time, 30) AS avgDeliveryMinutes FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON p.merchant_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON p.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON p.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id
